mapper.select: select r.reserve_date,r.reserve_time,mc.patient_name,mc.gender,mc.contact_phone,mc.age,dept.dept_name,d.doctor_name from reservation r inner join doctor d on d.doctor_no = r.doctor_no inner join medical_cards mc on mc.card_id = r.card_id inner join dept on d.dept_id = dept.dept_id where d.doctor_no=#{doctorNo};
